name: normal-style-indent
description: Normal style defines left=720 firstLine=360. Tests that direct w:ind left=0 overrides left but firstLine falls through to Normal per per-field merge.
expected_behavior: Para 1: left=720, firstLine=360 (Normal). Para 2: left=0 (direct), firstLine=360 (Normal). Para 3: left=0 (direct), firstLine=360 (Normal).
